---
title: "NHM Urban Research Station Survey Protocol — Annual Tree Survey"
author:
  - name: Ed Baker
    affiliation: Natural History Museum, London
  - name: John Tweddle
    affiliation: Natural History Museum, London
citation:
  container-title: Urban Research Station Reports
  issue: 2
date: "2025-10-05"
---

<a class="pdf-download" href="/assets/pdfs/2_Published-Protocol_2025_Tree-Survey.pdf">
  <img src="/assets/images/icons/pdf.svg" alt="PDF file" style="width:24px; height:auto; vertical-align:middle;"/>
  <span class="pdf-label">Download PDF</span>
</a>

Describe
